site_tagline: HUBzero metrics pipeline — one Python file, bug-for-bug compatible with the legacy PHP/Perl/Bash stack.
site_description: Documentation for hzmetrics.py: the Apache-log → MariaDB analytics pipeline that drives the public usage pages on HUBzero-based science gateways.
